The '''''Lambarian Crab''''' was a modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[YT-2400 light freighter/Legends|YT-2400 light freighter]].

==History==
The ship, by then using a different name, was initially owned by a honest trader, [[Matas Havel]], who traveled from the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. He invested profits in increasing the cargo capacity and the shields to deal with attacking pirates.<ref name="ss" />

Circa [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Havel retired and sold the ship to [[Finious Crab]], who christened it ''Lambarian Crab''. Wanting to smuggle in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]], Crab removed security and backup systems to make space for speed- and stealth-increasing customizations. He also added three secret compartments, one in the cover of a hallway, another in a cargo pod and a third one in the cockpit deck escape pod socket.<ref name="ss" />

Crab then made a name for himself in the Corellian system, dodging blockades and customs and enraging both the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Corellian Security Force]]s. However, during a run to [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]], the life support system failed to Crab's negligence in keeping up with maintenance; the pilot was frozen in hyperspace, although the ship reached Eriadu.<ref name="ss" />

The ''Crab'' was then salvaged and sold to [[Wroonian/Legends|Wroonian]] gunrunners [[Fillio Androu]] and [[Linx Mallicker]]. They discovered and made good use of two of Crab's secret compartments, but the last one in the cockpit deck escape pod socket remained not found.<ref name="ss" />

The Wroonians then used the ship to deal with illegal weapons through the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]], traveling from the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] to the Outer Rim Territories. They avoided Corellia because the ship was wanted there. Their customers were Imperial officers and cells of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="ss" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Stock Ships'' suggests that the undetected smuggling compartment, locked for several years, could hold some valuable small object, including [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] relics, maps to the [[Katana fleet]] and evidence to blackmail a person who, at that point, could have become a [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]].
